svg.text: Band A : the 8 design steps mapped to AyWizz components. Band B : how a prompt actually runs (chat-RAG turn + agentic C4 pipeline). Dashed grey = planned / D-010-gated.
A · Build-time blueprint — designing the agent system (1→4 top, then 5→8 bottom)
B · Run-time execution — how a prompt actually runs

g.text: • query rewrite / expansion before retrieve • hybrid BM25+dense+RRF in ③ (A.b) • cumulative chunk contextualisation (A.c)
• relevance self-check + iterative retrieval loop — R-400-206, D-010-gated (see B2 inset)

svg.text: B2 · C4 orchestrator pipeline (agentic) — 5 phases · 3 gates · iterate
loop · for phase in [ brainstorm → spec → plan → generate → review ]
gate fail → fix-attempt (≤ cap, then BLOCKED)
advance to next phase (re-enter loop at ③)

g.text: rewrite query → enter layer (L3 thematic / L1-L2 specific) → traverse
→ assess (descend / stop) → actively prune working set → repeat (bounded)
= the right side of "Agentic RAG" ; build only once v1 is demonstrably insufficient (needs the eval harness, step 8).
